description: Bill from midrashī Rabbi Shimʿon ben Yoḥay for receiving the funds toward books and such from a person named Albert Benyāmīn – 5 September 1948CE – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 162) – in Arabic and Hebrew. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 70). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בENL.
